sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (dt_str String, unix_ts UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY dt_str;
SELECT dt_str, toUnixTimestamp(dt_str) AS unix_ts FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET unix_ts = toUnixTimestamp(dt_str, 'Europe/London') WHERE dt_str = '2017-11-05 08:07:47';
SELECT dt_str, toUnixTimestamp(toDateTime(dt_str)) AS unix_ts_datetime, toUnixTimestamp(toDate(dt_str)) AS unix_ts_date FROM test_dates;
